json.title: French A
json.description:
**IB French A: Literature** is a **Group 1** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **literary works from different periods, forms, and cultures**, with a strong focus on **critical analysis, textual interpretation, and developing understanding of cultural perspectives through literature**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2013**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Guided literary analysis | 1h 15m | 2h 15m | 35% |
| **Paper 2** | Comparative essay | 1h 45m | 1h 45m | 35% (SL), 25% (HL) |
| **Individual Oral** | Oral presentation and discussion | 15 minutes | 15 minutes | 30% (SL), 20% (HL) |
| **HL Essay** | Written coursework essay | N/A | 1200-1500 words | 20% (HL only) |
